title: Compose Gradients with Readable Fallbacks
summary: Build and verify css gradients in decorative survey header and capacity-dial review through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css gradients from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css gradients without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

content.text: Linear gradients transition along a line, radial gradients from a center or shape, conic gradients around a center, and repeating gradients repeat stop intervals. Gradients are CSS images but do not use alt attributes. They should remain decorative, include a solid fallback, use controlled stops, and preserve contrast at every text location and when images or author colors disappear. Apply it to decorative survey header and capacity-dial review.
